services.description: Websites, e-commerce, custom web and mobile applications, integrations, AI solutions, modernization and maintenance — delivered end to end by one developer.

home.title: Turn your idea into fast, modern software — web, mobile, IoT and AI
home.lead: I'm Max — a fullstack developer from Lublin. I build custom software end to end: websites and online stores, bespoke web and mobile apps, automations and AI that take the repetitive work off your hands, and firmware for IoT and smart-home devices. From idea to launch you get a working product from one reliable person — quickly, and at a reasonable price.
home.servicesHeading: What I can build for you
home.servicesLead: From a simple company website to a fully custom application or automation built around the way your business works — everything under one roof, with a short delivery time.

talk.title: 1. We talk
talk.text: You tell me your idea and goals. I ask the right questions and suggest the simplest way to get there.

quote.title: 2. Clear quote
quote.text: You get a transparent estimate of scope, cost and time — no surprises, no hidden fees.

build.title: 3. I build it
build.text: I develop your product in short steps with a fast turnaround, and show you progress regularly, so you always know where we are.

launch.title: 4. Launch & care
launch.text: We go live. I stay available for support, changes and improvements whenever you need them.

home.projectsLead: Long-term commercial projects I've helped build — and I also deliver concrete products on short timelines.
home.reviewsLead: A few words from people I've worked with — see all of them on my Google profile.
home.ctaHeading: Have an idea? Let's make it real.
home.ctaLead: The first conversation and quote are free and with no obligation.

guarantees.heading: Work together, risk-free
guarantees.lead: The concrete things that set a reliable developer apart from a random contractor.

items.title: VAT invoice
items.text: I operate as a registered business and invoice with a VAT invoice — convenient for you and your accounting.

items.title: Contract & IP rights
items.text: A clear contract and full transfer of copyright to the code — the product is 100% yours.

items.title: Fix guarantee
items.text: Post-launch bug fixes are included — you're never left alone with a problem.

items.title: Clear upfront quote
items.text: You know the scope, cost and timeline before we start — no hidden fees, no surprises.

items.title: Fast delivery
items.text: I deliver concrete products on short timelines — a simple website often in a few days.

items.title: Talk to the developer
items.text: You talk directly to the developer who writes your code — no middlemen, no sales department.

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.lead: A few things clients ask most often.

items.q: How much does a website or app cost?
items.a: A simple website starts at 600 PLN, and custom apps and integrations are quoted individually. You always get a clear estimate before we start — the first conversation is free.
A simple site is usually delivered in a few days, and simpler jobs can be done in as little as 1–2 days. Larger applications are built in short stages where you regularly see working progress.

items.q: Do you issue a VAT invoice?
items.a: Yes. I operate as a registered business (VAT ID PL7133092677) and invoice with a VAT invoice.
You do. After settlement I hand over full copyright and all source code — you're never locked into a single vendor.

items.q: Do you work remotely or only in Lublin?
items.a: I'm based in Lublin and happy to meet in person, but I work remotely with clients across Poland and abroad.

items.q: What if I need changes after launch?
items.a: I stay available — I offer support and further development, from one-off fixes to ongoing care of your project.

pricing.heading: Transparent pricing
pricing.lead: We start from clear rates — usually about 40% of what agencies charge. The prices below are a starting point; you get the final quote before we start, with no hidden fees.
pricing.note: Indicative net prices, depending on scope. The first conversation and quote are free.

custom.title: Apps, integrations & AI
custom.text: Custom web and mobile apps, automations, integrations (including KSeF/JPK) and AI solutions are quoted individually — after a short, free conversation about your needs.

landing.name: One-pager / Landing
landing.desc: A single-page site that makes a first impression and collects leads.
features: One-page site or business card
Responsive and fast (mobile-first)
Contact form
Basic SEO and Google profile
Delivered in as little as 1–2 days

business.name: Business website
business.desc: A multi-page company website that builds trust and ranks on Google.
features: Several to a dozen subpages
Custom design (not a template)
On-page SEO and Core Web Vitals
Easy-to-edit content
Blog / news section (optional)

store.name: Online store
store.desc: A store ready to sell — with payments, shipping and a management panel.
features: Payments: cards, BLIK, transfers
Shipping integrations (InPost, courier)
Product and order management
Mobile-first and product-page SEO
Ready for promotions and growth

blog.heading: Blog
blog.lead: Practical know-how about websites, apps and automation for businesses — no jargon, straight from experience.
blog.ctaHeading: Have a question or a project in mind?
blog.ctaLead: The first conversation and quote are free and with no obligation.

services.heading: Services
services.lead: Everything you need to bring your idea online — with a special focus on custom software and automation tailored exactly to your business. Designed, built and maintained by one developer who speaks your language, not just code.

websites.title: Websites & landing pages
websites.description: A fast, modern website that builds trust and brings you clients — from a simple business card to a sales-focused landing page.
bullets: Built for Google (SEO) from day one

detail.intro: Your website is often the first impression a client gets. I build fast, modern sites that look great on every device, load in a blink and are ready for Google from day one — so people find you and trust you.
features: Business sites, portfolios and one-page landings
Custom design or a redesign of your current site — crafted, never a template
Mobile-first, responsive design
Optimised for speed and Core Web Vitals
SEO-ready structure, metadata and sitemaps
Easy-to-edit content and contact forms

faq.q: Will my site show up in Google?
faq.a: I build every site with SEO in mind — clean structure, fast loading, metadata and sitemaps — which gives you the best possible starting point to rank.

faq.q: Can I update the content myself?
faq.a: Yes — I can set up the site so you can edit texts and images easily, or handle updates for you as part of ongoing support.

ecommerce.title: Online stores & e-commerce
ecommerce.description: Start selling online with a store that's easy to manage, integrates payments and shipping, and looks great on every device.

detail.intro: Selling online should be simple — for you and your customers. I build online stores that are easy to manage, integrate payments and shipping, and are built to grow with promotions, new products and more traffic.
features: Product, order and inventory management
Custom storefront design — or a redesign of your existing store
Online payments and shipping integrations
Discounts, promotions and coupon support
Mobile-first storefront that converts
Analytics and SEO for product pages

faq.q: Which payment methods can I offer?
faq.a: Common Polish and international gateways — cards, BLIK, transfers and more — can be integrated depending on your needs.

faq.q: Can it handle a growing catalogue?
faq.a: Yes — stores are built to scale, so adding products, promotions and traffic won't break things.

webapps.title: Custom web applications
webapps.description: Tailor-made tools that fit your business exactly — client panels, CRMs, dashboards, booking systems and SaaS products.

detail.intro: Off-the-shelf software rarely fits the way your company actually works. I build custom web applications around your exact processes — so your team stops fighting spreadsheets and clunky tools and starts working faster. From a simple internal panel to a full SaaS product, you get exactly what you need and nothing you don't.
features: Client and admin panels with roles and permissions
UI/UX design and redesign built together with the app
CRMs, dashboards and reporting tailored to your data
Booking, reservation and order-management systems
SaaS products with subscriptions and multi-tenant support
Secure APIs and integrations with your existing tools

faq.q: How much does a custom web application cost?
faq.a: It depends on scope, but I always start with a free conversation and a transparent estimate before any work begins — so you know the cost up front.

faq.q: How long does it take?
faq.a: Small tools can be ready in a few weeks; larger applications are delivered in short stages so you see working progress regularly.

mobile.title: Mobile apps (iOS & Android)
mobile.description: Reach your customers on their phones with one app that runs on both iOS and Android — faster and cheaper than building it twice.
bullets: One codebase for iOS and Android
From idea to the app stores

detail.intro: Your customers live on their phones — a good mobile app keeps you in their pocket. I build apps with React Native and Expo, so one codebase runs on both iOS and Android: faster to build, cheaper to maintain and consistent everywhere.
features: One codebase for iOS and Android
Clean, native-feeling UI/UX design created alongside the app
Native performance and a smooth, modern UI
Push notifications, offline mode and device features
Backend, APIs and admin panel included when needed
Publishing to the App Store and Google Play

faq.q: Do you build for both iOS and Android?
faq.a: Yes — with React Native both platforms are covered from a single codebase, which saves time and money versus building twice.

faq.q: Can you also handle the backend?
faq.a: Absolutely. As a fullstack developer I can deliver the app, the server, the API and the admin panel as one complete product.

integrations.title: Integrations & automation
integrations.description: Connect your systems and automate the boring, repetitive work — payments, invoicing (KSeF, JPK), external APIs and more.

detail.intro: Most businesses lose hours every week to repetitive, manual work — copying data between systems, generating the same reports, sending the same messages. I connect your tools and automate those tasks, so the work happens by itself and your team can focus on what matters.
features: Connecting your systems, apps and external APIs
Payment, invoicing (KSeF, JPK) and accounting integrations
Automated reports, notifications and reminders
Data synchronisation between platforms — no more copy-paste
Scheduled jobs and event-based workflows

faq.q: What can actually be automated?
faq.a: If a task is repetitive and rule-based — moving data, generating documents, sending emails, syncing systems — it can almost always be automated.

faq.q: Will it work with the software I already use?
faq.a: In most cases yes. If a tool offers an API or export I can usually connect it; if not, we find the best workaround.

ksef.title: KSeF & e-invoicing
ksef.description: Get your company ready for Poland's mandatory KSeF — e-invoicing integrated into the system you already use, on time and without the chaos.
bullets: Integration with the National e-Invoicing System (KSeF)
Send and receive invoices from your own system
Compliant with JPK and e-invoicing requirements

detail.intro: Structured e-invoices in KSeF are becoming mandatory in Poland — and many companies still don't know how to prepare. I handle it for you: integrating KSeF with the software you already use (invoicing, ERP, store), or delivering a simple way to issue and receive structured invoices. No downtime, fully compliant, on time.
features: Integration with the KSeF API (production and test environments)
Sending and receiving structured invoices (FA(2)/FA(3))
Connecting to your invoicing system, ERP or store
Authentication: token, seal or qualified signature
Error handling, statuses and UPO, plus invoice archiving
Compliance with JPK and reporting

faq.q: When does KSeF become mandatory?
faq.a: Poland's mandatory KSeF rollout is phased by company size, so it's worth preparing early. I'll advise what applies to your company and build the integration ahead of time.

faq.q: Do I have to change my invoicing software?
faq.a: Usually not. If your system has an API or export, I connect KSeF to what you already use. If it doesn't, I propose the simplest workaround.

ai.title: AI solutions
ai.description: Put artificial intelligence to work in your business — a website chatbot, an assistant for emails and quotes, and automations that save time and money.
bullets: Assistant for emails, quotes and documents
AI automations wired into your workflow

detail.intro: AI is no longer just hype — used well, it saves real time and money. I help you put it to work in practical ways: a chatbot answering customers 24/7, an assistant for emails and quotes, a search across your knowledge base, or automatic document processing — integrated into the tools you already use.
features: Chatbot and virtual assistant for your website or app
Automating replies to enquiries, emails and quotes
Search across your knowledge base and documents (RAG)
AI that reads, summarises and processes documents
Integrations with LLMs (e.g. Claude, GPT) into your workflow
Content and support tools tailored to your business

faq.q: Is AI worth it for a small business?
faq.a: Often yes — even a simple assistant or document automation can save hours a week. We start small and expand what proves valuable.

faq.q: Is my data safe?
faq.a: Yes. I design AI solutions with privacy in mind and choose tools and setups that keep your data under your control.

embedded.title: Embedded systems & IoT
embedded.description: Custom firmware for microcontrollers and connected devices — ESP32, Raspberry Pi Pico, STM32 and Arduino, from prototype to production.
bullets: Firmware for ESP32, Pico (RP2040), STM32 & Arduino
Wireless & IoT: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth LE, MQTT
Smart home, sensors and cloud integration

detail.intro: I write custom firmware that brings electronics to life. Whether you have a hardware prototype that needs solid software, a smart-home or automation idea built around a microcontroller, or an existing device that should talk to the internet, I turn it into a stable, secure and production-ready solution. I work with the platforms that dominate modern IoT — ESP32, Raspberry Pi Pico, STM32 and Arduino — covering wireless connectivity, sensors, power optimisation and cloud integration.
features: Firmware for ESP32, ESP8266, Raspberry Pi Pico (RP2040), STM32 and Arduino
Wireless connectivity: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) and MQTT
Smart home and home automation — custom devices, sensors and controllers
Sensor handling, measurement systems and hardware control
Low-power design and battery-life optimisation
Cloud and app integration for remote monitoring and control
Built with C/C++, ESP-IDF, MicroPython and FreeRTOS

faq.q: Which microcontrollers and platforms do you work with?
faq.a: Mainly ESP32 and ESP8266, Raspberry Pi Pico (RP2040), STM32 and Arduino — using C/C++, ESP-IDF, MicroPython and FreeRTOS. If your project uses a different chip, just ask.

faq.q: I only have a prototype or an idea — can you help?
faq.a: Yes. I often take hardware from a breadboard prototype to reliable, production-ready firmware, including wireless connectivity and cloud integration. We start with a free conversation and a clear estimate.

modernization.title: Modernization & migration
modernization.description: Breathe new life into an old, slow or hard-to-maintain application — rewrites, migrations and performance improvements.

detail.intro: An old, slow or fragile application holds your business back. I modernise legacy systems — rewriting outdated code, migrating to current technologies and improving performance — so your software is fast, stable and ready for the future again.
features: Rewriting and refreshing legacy applications
Visual redesign and a refreshed, modern UI as part of the upgrade
Migrations (e.g. JavaScript to TypeScript, framework upgrades)
Performance and stability improvements
Removing technical debt and improving maintainability
Gradual modernisation with no big-bang risk

faq.q: Do I have to rebuild everything at once?
faq.a: No — I usually modernise step by step, so the system keeps working while it improves and there's no risky all-at-once switch.

faq.q: My app's original developer is gone — can you help?
faq.a: Yes. I regularly pick up existing codebases, understand them and take over development and maintenance.

audit.title: SEO audit & optimization
audit.description: I'll find out why your site is slow or invisible on Google — and fix what actually affects customers.
bullets: SEO, speed and Core Web Vitals audit
A concrete, prioritised list of fixes

detail.intro: You have a website but it doesn't bring in clients? I check what's holding it back: speed, Core Web Vitals, SEO issues, structure and Google visibility. You get a concrete, prioritised report — and if you want, I implement the fixes and set up your Google profile so customers find you locally.
features: On-page and technical SEO audit
Speed and Core Web Vitals analysis
Visibility and keyword audit
A concrete report with prioritised fixes
Implementation and optimisation of the changes
Google Business Profile setup and optimisation (maps)

faq.q: Do I get concrete guidance or just a report?
faq.a: Both. You get a clear, prioritised report, and if you want I implement the fixes right away, so you don't need to find anyone else.

faq.q: Will you handle my Google profile and maps?
faq.a: Yes. I'll set up or optimise your Google Business Profile so customers find you in local search results and on maps.

maintenance.title: Maintenance & support
maintenance.description: Keep your site or app fast, secure and up to date — with a developer who's there when something needs fixing or improving.
bullets: SEO and Core Web Vitals optimization

detail.intro: Software isn't 'done' at launch — it needs care to stay fast, secure and up to date. I keep your site or app healthy with monitoring, updates and improvements, and I'm there when something needs fixing.
features: Hosting, monitoring and regular updates
Security patches and dependency upgrades
SEO and Core Web Vitals optimisation
Bug fixes and small improvements on request
A reliable point of contact when you need one

faq.q: Do you offer ongoing support?
faq.a: Yes — I offer flexible maintenance and support, from occasional fixes to regular care, matched to what your project needs.

faq.q: Can you take over a site someone else built?
faq.a: In most cases yes — I can review the existing project, stabilise it and maintain it going forward.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.lead: I work in two ways: as a long-term partner on ongoing commercial projects, and as someone who delivers concrete products and services on short timelines. Below is a selection of both, plus a few things I built just for fun.
projects.commercialText: Long-term engagements where I join a team or a product and help build and grow it over months or years.
projects.websitesText: Before 2019 I designed and built a number of websites for local businesses.
projects.ownText: Sometimes I build things just for the joy of it.

about.heading: About me
about.lead: Fullstack developer, husband, volunteer firefighter and motorcyclist based in Lublin, Poland.
about.intro: I've been building for the web since 2016 — from small business websites to complex applications for international companies. I care about clean code, real results and honest communication.

interests.firefighting: firefighting (squad leader in a volunteer fire department)

about.educationText: Engineer, University of Life Sciences, Lublin

contact.heading: Let's talk
contact.lead: Would you like to build something together? Tell me about your idea — the first conversation and quote are free.
contact.responseNote: I usually reply within an hour (during business hours).

form.success: Thanks! Your message has been sent — I'll get back to you soon.
